title: Undertrials, convicts can't vote from jail: Madras High Court
description: The Madras High Court on Wednesday dismissed a plea by a detainee seeking to vote in the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, citing the statutory bar on prisoners voting. A Bench of Chief Justice SA Dharmadikari and Justice Arul Murugan dismissed the plea in view of Section 62(5) of the Representation of the People Act, 1951, which permits only persons under preventive detention to exercise their right to vote.Hari Nadar, currently lodged in Puzhal Central Prison, approached the Madras High Cour
